narrative:
Lorain County has 213,997 registered voters, with 57.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.9%, a clear Democratic lean of 7.2 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 29.5% of registrants.
